summary: Software Developer with hands-on experience building production web applications using React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Liquid. Proven track record developing Shopify themes, customer management platforms, and DevOps solutions across freelance and enterprise environments, with a passion for applying classroom learning to real-world products.

skills.label: Languages
skills.value: TypeScript, Liquid, Java, Python, PHP, SQL, HTML/CSS, Bash

skills.label: Frameworks & Libraries
skills.value: React.js, Next.js, Express.js, Prisma ORM, TailwindCSS, Shadcn UI, GSAP, Zod, React-PDF

skills.label: Tools & Platforms
skills.value: Shopify, WordPress, Git, Docker, PostgreSQL, Linux, Nginx, Node.js, REST APIs, Google APIs & Cloud (maps, sheets, drive)

bullets: Selected for competitive summer internship at one of Canada's largest financial institutions
Lead developer for a customer management platform serving a Netherlands-based go-karting company
Worked directly with the client to scope requirements, plan features, and fine-tune the features
Maintained a growing codebase by establishing consistent patterns, modular architecture, and clear documentation
Worked on Baden Sports Shopify Store, Sitings.ca custom WordPress integration, and DonChendo
Collaborated closely with designers, senior developers, and the marketing team during frequent meetings and presentations
Gained experience working across multiple projects simultaneously while adapting to different tech stacks and client needs
Built internal tooling for automating email template management for the entire company
Closely integrated Zoho APIs and a Node and React interface that allowed employees to save time customizing their email templates
Self-taught Python fundamentals and immediately applied them to deliver production features
Wrote a custom basketball personalization feature using Liquid for previewing custom designs on products before ordering
Migrated an outdated Shopify theme to a modern version, preserving existing customizations and improving maintainability
Implemented responsive storefront optimizations and ensured cross-browser compatibility
Building a full-stack customer management system using TypeScript, Next.js, and Prisma with PostgreSQL for event registration and automated invoicing
Implemented email notifications with Resend, invoice generation with React-PDF, and cloud file storage via Google Drive API
Designed a relational database schema handling customers, events, sessions, and invoices with Prisma ORM migrations
Developed a flash SMS notification system using Next.js, TypeScript, GatewayAPI, and PostgreSQL with message queuing and delivery tracking
Deployed on self-hosted infrastructure using Docker and Nginx on a Linux VM with Active Directory authentication
Built a centralized web interface for school staff to compose, schedule, and monitor bulk SMS communications
Authored an 80-page bilingual documentation PDF in English and Portuguese covering system architecture, usage guides, and maintenance procedures
Built a real estate site selection and finding tool using PHP and JavaScript with WordPress Advanced Custom Fields (ACF)
Integrated Google Maps JavaScript API with marker clustering for grouping nearby properties and clickable pins that display listing details
Implemented dynamic filtering with AJAX loading, loading animations, and bookmarkable URLs using vanilla JavaScript
